svg.title: CrisisBridge — guest alert flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing a guest scanning a QR code, selecting an emergency type, entering context, Gemini classifying the incident, and either pushing action cards to staff or triggering offline fallback.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the QR code trigger work in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('How does CrisisBridge offline fallback work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Signal Flare UI look like?')
sendPrompt('What does RED zone mean in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('What does BLUE zone mean in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('What does GREEN zone mean in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('Why does CrisisBridge require a long press to confirm?')
sendPrompt('What context can a guest provide in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini classify emergencies in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('What happens when Gemini is unsure in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('What are micro-task action cards in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('How does CrisisBridge log incidents to Firestore?')
